privacy_boundary: Derived public-safe summary only. Raw x-satellite NDJSON is not committed. ORI raw message text, numeric Discord IDs, hidden replies, actor-level likes, DMs, and private context are excluded.

mind_projection.role: Geometric intelligence researcher working across Closure-SDK style S³ computation, metaphysics-as-physics, digital brains, learning, language, and truth-seeking.
mind_projection.core_thesis: Ideas have shape. Learning is geometry. Intelligence is not a slogan about scale; it is a physical process of closure, measurement, self-organization, and representation.
mind_projection.projection_boundary: This is a modeled public projection built from ORI aggregate metadata, a visible X/Twitter profile scrape, and Walter’s public Substack surface. It is written in first person to make the profile legible, but it is not a claim that Walter authored or approved this wording. Raw dumps and raw Discord text stay out.

voice_model.best_legible_side: mathematical, philosophical, intense, integrative, trying to collapse the false border between physics, metaphysics, cognition, and computation without losing rigor
voice_model.cadence: starts from a provocative equivalence, names the hidden geometry, then grounds it in computation, learning, or a public artifact
avoid: claiming proof where there is only a research direction
